title: Furnitures O' Plenty
description: This mod compats Biomes O' Plenty with Mr. Crayfish's Refurbished Furniture mod.
body:
--- ## 🌟 Furnitures O’ Plenty Furnitures O’ Plenty (FOP) expands your decorating possibilities by bringing together the best of **Biomes O’ Plenty** and **MrCrayfish’s Furniture Mod**! Enjoy a wide variety of furniture crafted from every unique Biomes O’ Plenty wood type — from maple to empyreal — all designed to blend seamlessly with Minecraft’s style. Decorate your world, match your biomes, and make your builds truly feel like home! **⚠️ This mod is currently in beta. Use it wisely! Some features might not be added yet!**

*Note: This block does not exist in the mod. This block is used for visualization only.*
--- ## 📦 Overview **This mod of Minecraft combines every wood type from Biomes O' Plenty to the furnitures from Mr.Crayfish's Refurbished Furniture mod.** --- ## 🪑 Mod Features Details Furniture variants for all Biomes O' Plenty wood types: - Crates and Storage Jars - Chairs, Tables, and Desks - Ceiling Fans and Mailboxes - Baths, Toilets, and Basins - Storage Cabinets and Drawers - Lattice Fences and Lattice Fence Gates - Kitchen Cabinetry, Kitchen Drawers and Kitchen Sinks - Cutting Boards, Kitchen Cabinets, and Kitchen Storage Cabinets **Wood Types:** Fir, Pine, Maple, Redwood, Mahogany, Jacaranda, Palm, Willow, Dead, Magic, Umbran, Hellbark, Empyreal **... And hedges in different leaf types from BOP:** Flowering Oak, Cypress, Snowblossom, Origin, Rainbow Birch, Fir, Pine, Red Maple, Orange Maple, Yellow Maple, Redwood, Mahogany, Jacaranda, Palm, Willow, Dead, Magic, Umbran, Hellbark, Empyreal. --- ## 🌏 Available Languages - English (US) - Chinese (Simplified, Credit to ChengBubble) --- ## 📝 License - MIT License — See [`LICENSE.txt`](LICENSE.txt) for details --- ## 💾 Installation 1. Download your preferred version from **[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/furnitures-o-plenty)** or **[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/furnitures-o-plenty)**. 2. Make sure you have **Minecraft Forge** installed for the Minecraft version, 1.20.1 and forge 47 and above 3. Place the mod `.jar` file into your `mods` folder located inside your `.minecraft` files. 4. Installed the correct mod dependencies: **[Biomes O' Plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty) (Version: 1.0.14 or above)** and **[Refurbished Furniture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture) (Version 19.0.0.90 or above)**. Make sure you installed their mod dependencies as well. You can check their dependencies in their mod descriptions. 5. Launch Minecraft and enjoy your new furniture! --- ## 🔗 Mod Links ### Official Pages - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/furnitures-o-plenty) - [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/furnitures-o-plenty) ### GitHub - [Repository](https://github.com/RSlover521/Furnitures-O-Plenty) - [Report an Issue](https://github.com/RSlover521/Furnitures-O-Plenty/issues) ### Dependencies - [Biomes O' Plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty) - [Refurbished Furniture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture) --- ### 🌟 Supported Mod Versions | Versions |Supported| |-----------|-| | FOP 1.0.0 |❌| | FOP 1.0.1 |❌| | FOP 1.0.2 |❌| | FOP 1.0.3 |❌| | FOP 1.1.0 |✅| **Note: Please review your mod version before you open an issue on the github issue page!** ---
